description_long: This is a modern, open-shelving unit with a combination of light and dark wood finishes. The structure features four horizontal shelves supported by vertical posts, with the right side incorporating a two-tone cabinet at the bottom. The cabinet section includes a sliding door, with one half in a darker wood and the other in a lighter wood, providing concealed storage. The rest of the shelves are open, offering ample space for displaying or storing items. The design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban environments such as offices, living rooms, or public waiting areas. The materials and construction suggest durability and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, open-shelving unit with four shelves and a two-tone sliding-door cabinet at the bottom right, combining light and dark wood finishes.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all four shelves and the two-tone sliding-door cabinet on the lower right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the cabinet, with the vertical supports visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the cabinet and shelves, with the two-tone cabinet panel visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the shelf depth and the cabinet's side profile.
